title: ElNet CO Transfer Switch | Control Applications
content_html:
ElNet CO exchange controller HV/generator

The Elant CO system is designed for an efficient exchange between two power supply sources (electricity company / generator) in the event of a malfunction in one of the power supply systems.

The system is more reliable than any other replacement system.

The system saves installation of command and delay relays and lack of voltage relays, switches, voltmeters and more.


Elant CO includes a friendly color graphic screen in the Hebrew language that enables, among other things, the following actions:
- Registration of up to 1000 alerts and electrical events including date, hour and second.
- RS485 communication for building control in an open protocol.
- Perfect protection for the generator (Double Interlock).
- Sophisticated test software for the board manufacturer and the user to test all wiring and operations.
- The possibility of running a generator in Shabbat operation with reference to the Hebrew astronomical calendar.
- Changing parameters and timers and more.
- For a full Israeli standard system that includes EMC and - Safety.
